daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings pulling you toward something new—your inner compass knows what's up.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's a vibe shift happening. If attached, lean into deeper convos. Single? Someone's noticing your energy.
daily.career: Your magnetism at work is unmatched rn. This is the moment to speak up about what you actually want. People are listening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest mixed with movement. Do something that feels good, not forced—yoga, a walk, or just vibing with tea.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is inviting you to shed what no longer serves you. Mercury's movement is sparking clarity in your mind—trust those sudden realizations. You're entering a phase where authenticity becomes your superpower.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering something sweet about vulnerability this week. If you've been holding back, now's the time to let someone see the real you. Single? Someone's paying attention more than you realize.
weekly.career: Your intuition about a project or decision is spot-on right now. Don't second-guess yourself. This is the week to pitch ideas, propose changes, or take a small risk that aligns with your actual values.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding this week—think walks in nature or practices that reconnect you to the present moment. Energy levels feel restored when you honor your need for quiet reflection.
